MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Based On Forum Non Conveniens.

Off calendar pending possible coordination or complex designation.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Based On Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Continued To Feb-03-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION's Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Based On Forum Non Conveniens is continued to February 3, 2020 pending coordination decision by the Judicial Council. If appropriate for an earlier hearing, the parties are to contact the court to obtain a new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
